mapper.sql: id, scenic_id, scenic_name, in_people, income, report_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
insert into base_ticket (id, scenic_id, scenic_name, in_people, income, report_time, create_time, update_time ) values
( #{item.id}, #{item.scenicId}, #{item.scenicName}, #{item.inPeople}, #{item.income}, #{item.reportTime}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
on duplicate key update in_people = values(in_people), income = values(income), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select: select sum(in_people) as num,scenic_name from base_ticket where report_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} group by scenic_id
select sum(income) from base_ticket where report_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime}
select sum(in_people) as num, scenic_name as scenic from base_ticket where report_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} GROUP BY scenic_name
